source: local prompt_ref synthesis; ignored core asset

presets.name: 产品英雄广告
presets.scene: 单个产品的高端商业主视觉，适合饮料、美妆、数码、包装和电商首图。
presets.positive: Seedream high-fidelity commercial product hero image. Main product: [产品]. Brand mood: [品牌气质]. Place the product centered and dominant, logo facing camera, exact shape and material preserved, condensation or tactile surface details visible when relevant. Background: [场景/背景], clean premium advertising composition, cinematic studio lighting, controlled reflections, realistic shadow contact, sharp product edge, 4K detail, no extra products, no unrelated props. If text is needed, use only this exact text: [文字].
presets.negative: wrong logo, misspelled text, extra labels, deformed product, duplicate product, clutter, low resolution, watermark, bad reflection, floating object

params.Seedream: 适合文生图或参考图生图；产品图建议上传参考并强调 preserve exact shape.

presets.name: 电商白底棚拍
presets.scene: 干净可售卖的产品棚拍，强调形状、材质、阴影和平台合规。
presets.positive: Create a clean e-commerce packshot of [产品]. Keep the product true to reference, front-facing or [角度], centered on a seamless warm-white studio background, realistic soft shadow under the object, accurate color and material, crisp label readability, high resolution product photography, minimal retouching, no lifestyle props unless specified: [必要道具].
presets.negative: busy background, extra objects, wrong color, wrong label, fake logo, cropped product, harsh shadow, overexposed white, text artifacts, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合商品库图、SKU图、详情页第一屏。

presets.name: 生活方式产品场景
presets.scene: 把产品放进真实使用场景，适合品牌叙事和社媒图。
presets.positive: A realistic lifestyle advertising scene for [产品], used by [用户/人群] in [真实场景]. The product remains clearly visible and brand-consistent, natural human gesture, believable scale, cinematic but not exaggerated lighting, shallow depth of field, editorial commercial photography, warm authentic mood, tactile details, no distracting background objects. Visual story: [卖点/情绪].
presets.negative: product hidden, wrong scale, distorted hands, fake smile, messy background, extra text, watermark, overprocessed skin, uncanny face

params.Seedream: 适合图生图时锁产品，再换场景。

presets.name: 饮品飞溅微距
presets.scene: 饮料、果汁、咖啡、啤酒等高冲击力商业图。
presets.positive: Ultra-realistic beverage advertising macro shot of [饮品/容器], centered and sharp, covered with cold condensation droplets. A dynamic splash of [液体颜色/材质] erupts behind or around the product, with [水果/冰块/配料] arranged at the base. Dramatic studio lighting, high-speed photography feel, crisp droplets, premium color grading, clean composition, 4K detail, label readable and undistorted.
presets.negative: muddy splash, unreadable label, fake liquid physics, extra cans, wrong fruit, low detail, cartoon, watermark, messy typography

params.Seedream: 参考库里饮料 splash 类型很强，可泛化到多品牌。

presets.name: 香水九宫格大片
presets.scene: 同一产品九张高级广告方向探索，适合香水、美妆、首饰。
presets.positive: A 3x3 luxury product photography grid for [产品]. Keep product identity identical in every panel: same bottle shape, cap, label, material, color and proportions. Each panel explores one premium composition: water ripple, falling petals, silk fabric, golden reflection, marble tabletop, mist, macro detail, backlit silhouette, clean packshot. High-end editorial advertising, soft studio light, polished reflections, no text labels or panel numbers.
presets.negative: panel numbers, text captions, changed product shape, wrong logo, inconsistent bottle, cluttered layout, low quality, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合一次出方向，也可拆成单张重跑。

presets.name: 角色一致性设定表
presets.scene: 锁定人物/角色身份，用于后续图生图、视频、表情和换装。
presets.positive: Seedream character identity reference sheet for [角色]. Layout: left large chest-up portrait, right three full-body views front, side, back. Preserve exact face identity, hairstyle, body proportions, outfit, accessories and color palette across all views. Neutral warm-gray background, consistent soft studio light, realistic skin texture, clean design sheet, no labels, no numbers, no extra characters. Character details: [角色细节].
presets.negative: different face between views, changed outfit, labels, numbers, extra people, distorted hands, bad anatomy, plastic skin, watermark

params.Seedream: 用于参考图锁脸、换场景、Seedance角色基底。

presets.name: 美妆精修
presets.scene: 人像/美妆图的自然商业修图，不破坏身份。
presets.positive: Retouch the reference portrait of [人物] for a premium beauty campaign. Preserve identity, face structure, skin tone, hairstyle and pose. Improve skin with natural texture still visible, refine makeup: [妆容方向], enhance catchlights, smooth stray hair, clean background, high-end beauty editorial color, crisp but natural detail, no change to facial identity.
presets.negative: different person, wax skin, over-smoothing, changed eye shape, changed nose, heavy filter, fake makeup, artifacts, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合豆包 P 图类一键美化/妆容参考。

presets.name: 发型妆容替换
presets.scene: 改变发型、发色、妆容，同时保留人物身份和服装。
presets.positive: Edit the reference image: keep [人物] identity, facial features, pose, clothing and background unchanged. Change only hair and makeup according to: [发型/发色/妆容]. Make the result photorealistic, salon-quality, natural hair strands, believable lighting match, no mask edges, no changes to face shape or body.
presets.negative: changed identity, changed outfit, changed background, wig look, hard mask edge, smeared hair, unnatural color, distorted face, watermark

params.Seedream: 局部编辑时最好明确 only hair and makeup.

presets.name: 服装换装
presets.scene: 模特/角色换衣，保留姿态、脸和场景。
presets.positive: Edit the image of [人物]. Preserve identity, face, hair, body pose, camera angle and background. Replace only the outfit with [目标服装], including accurate fabric, fit, seams, accessories and footwear. Match original lighting and shadows on the body, realistic cloth folds, fashion editorial quality, no visible edit boundary.
presets.negative: changed face, changed pose, changed background, broken limbs, bad fabric, wrong size, mask edges, duplicated accessories, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合服装试穿和时尚方案探索。

presets.name: 材质替换
presets.scene: 家具、包装、服装、道具的材质替换和表面质感测试。
presets.positive: Edit [对象] in the reference image. Keep the exact shape, scale, position, camera angle and surrounding scene unchanged. Replace only its material with [新材质], showing believable surface texture, reflections, roughness, thickness and edge behavior. Lighting and shadows must match the original photo, photorealistic result, no geometry drift.
presets.negative: changed shape, changed scene, wrong scale, texture smear, unrealistic reflection, hard mask edge, extra objects, watermark

params.Seedream: 从参考库的材质替换/P图能力抽象而来。

presets.name: 局部物体替换
presets.scene: 把图中某个物体替换为目标物，同时保持环境真实。
presets.positive: Replace [原对象] in the reference image with [新对象]. Preserve the rest of the image unchanged: background, camera angle, lighting, shadows, people and composition. The new object must fit the scene naturally, correct perspective, correct contact shadow, matching color temperature, photorealistic texture, no visible edit seams.
presets.negative: changed background, changed people, wrong perspective, floating object, hard edge, duplicate object, bad shadow, watermark

params.Seedream: 局部替换要写清 preserve the rest unchanged.

presets.name: 光影色调重塑
presets.scene: 同一图像的电影光影、时间、氛围转换。
presets.positive: Transform the reference image lighting and color grade to [目标光影/时间/情绪]. Keep subject identity, composition, pose, objects and camera angle unchanged. Add physically believable light direction, shadows, reflections and atmospheric depth. Cinematic color grading, natural contrast, no overprocessing, no changes to object geometry.
presets.negative: changed subject, changed layout, unrealistic light, muddy colors, overexposure, halo edge, extra objects, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合日夜转换、黄金时刻、霓虹夜景、柔光棚拍。

presets.name: 参考风格迁移
presets.scene: 把主体迁移到参考风格，不照搬参考图内容。
presets.positive: Use the uploaded style reference only for visual language: [风格要点]. Generate [主体] with original content and composition: [内容描述]. Preserve the subject requirements, do not copy characters, objects or layout from the style reference. Match color palette, lens, lighting, material treatment and finish, high-fidelity Seedream image, clean final composition.
presets.negative: copying reference subject, wrong content, inconsistent style, low detail, text artifacts, watermark, over-stylized, messy background

params.Seedream: 区分 style reference 和 content reference。

presets.name: 室内建筑真实感
presets.scene: 空间设计、展厅、民宿、商业室内和建筑概念图。
presets.positive: Photorealistic architectural interior of [空间类型], design style [设计风格], key materials [材质], functional layout [功能布局]. Wide-angle but natural perspective, vertical lines straight, realistic daylight and practical lights, clean staged environment, tactile furniture and surface details, high-end interior photography, no impossible geometry, no fake windows.
presets.negative: warped walls, impossible layout, extra doors, broken furniture, fisheye distortion, low detail, messy clutter, watermark, unreadable signage

params.Seedream: 适合空间设计方案和参考图改风格。

presets.name: 医疗科普便当图
presets.scene: 药品、健康、科研知识卡片，参考模块化 Bento 信息图。
presets.positive: Create a professional medical science infographic poster about [主题]. Modular Bento Grid layout, clinical white background, medical blue and slate gray accents, clean cards with icons, charts and one realistic macro product/subject image. Sections: overview, mechanism, usage, timeline, precautions, audience. Use only exact Chinese headings provided: [标题文字]. Keep typography neat, hierarchy clear, no fabricated tiny unreadable text.
presets.negative: medical misinformation, unreadable microtext, messy layout, wrong anatomy, random numbers, watermark, garish colors, low resolution

params.Seedream: 含文字场景需短标题、少文字、分区明确。

presets.name: 微缩施工奇观
presets.scene: 巨型产品/食物/物体与微缩工人，适合趣味广告和概念图。
presets.positive: Hyper-realistic miniature diorama: [巨型主体] becomes a monumental construction site. Dozens of tiny workers with scaffolding, ladders, tools and safety gear interact with its surface. Macro photography, tilt-shift depth of field, accurate scale contrast, playful but premium commercial look, rich material detail, natural tabletop or [环境] setting, cinematic light.
presets.negative: wrong scale, toy-like workers, messy composition, unreadable logo, extra brands, low detail, cartoon, watermark, bad shadows

params.Seedream: 参考库里 miniature construction 类型很有复用价值。

presets.name: 等距城市信息卡
presets.scene: 城市、品牌总部、活动天气卡和社媒信息视觉。
presets.positive: Clear 45-degree top-down isometric miniature 3D scene of [城市/地点], featuring iconic landmarks and local atmosphere. Soft PBR materials, refined cartoon-real render, tiny people and vehicles, current weather integrated visually: [天气]. Minimal solid background. Optional centered title only: [标题]. Balanced composition, readable large text if included, no clutter.
presets.negative: wrong landmarks, unreadable small text, clutter, distorted buildings, inconsistent weather, watermark, low quality, random labels

params.Seedream: 可用于城市卡片、旅游海报、活动视觉。

presets.name: 超现实产品世界
presets.scene: 把产品放进有机、科幻、自然或梦境世界，适合海报主视觉。
presets.positive: Surreal cinematic product world for [产品]. The product floats or stands as the sharp focal point, exact identity preserved, surrounded by [超现实元素] that visually express [卖点]. Hyper-real material detail, dramatic depth, controlled color palette, believable light interaction, premium campaign poster composition, no random objects, no text unless specified.
presets.negative: product distorted, logo changed, chaotic elements, fake physics, unreadable label, oversaturated, watermark, low detail

params.Seedream: 从 organic landscape / sci-fi product 广告抽象。

presets.name: 复古软件盒
presets.scene: 把网站、App、服务变成 90 年代实体软件盒/CD-ROM。
presets.positive: Turn [网站/App/服务] into a nostalgic 1995 software box and CD-ROM product photo. Physical cardboard retail box, old Windows/Mac era design language, pixel icons, glossy CD partially visible, carpet or desk setting, believable printed packaging with exact title [标题], retro tech color palette, photorealistic still life, soft indoor light.
presets.negative: modern UI, wrong title, unreadable text, fake brand marks, warped box, extra packaging, watermark, low resolution

params.Seedream: 参考库中 website to product box 类型，适合趣味品牌物料。

presets.name: 高清修复放大
presets.scene: 老照片、低清图、压缩图修复，保留原始内容。
presets.positive: Restore and upscale the reference image of [对象/人物]. Preserve original composition, identity, clothing, objects and era. Remove compression artifacts, recover natural detail, improve sharpness carefully, balance exposure and color, keep realistic film or photo texture, no invented facial features, no style change, clean high-resolution output.
presets.negative: changed identity, invented details, plastic skin, oversharpening, denoise smear, color shift, changed background, watermark

params.Seedream: 适合 P 图高清修复；重点写 preserve original.

presets.name: 15秒电影分镜
presets.scene: 通用 15 秒短片，多镜头、明确时间轴、情绪递进。
presets.positive: Seedance 2.0 video prompt. Format: [比例] cinematic video, 15 seconds, 24fps, high realism. Story concept: [故事概念]. Structure: 0-3s establishing wide shot, 3-6s medium action setup, 6-10s close-up emotional turn, 10-13s climax movement, 13-15s final hero frame. Keep the same subject [主体] and environment continuity. Camera language: smooth cinematic motion, motivated cuts, natural motion blur, consistent lighting, no captions.
presets.negative: text captions, subtitles, watermark, jump cuts, inconsistent character, changing outfit, warped hands, flicker, low resolution

params.Seedance: 参考库最常见结构：时间轴 + 镜头 + 连贯性约束。

presets.name: 一镜到底动作戏
presets.scene: 高能动作、追逐、武术、英雄出场。
presets.positive: A 15-second continuous single-shot action sequence for Seedance. Subject: [主角]. Location: [场景]. The camera follows in one unbroken take: starts behind the subject, accelerates into the action, circles around during the key move, then pulls back to reveal the aftermath. Choreography: [动作设计]. Hyper-real cinematic motion, strong spatial continuity, practical impacts, readable body mechanics, dramatic but clean VFX, no cuts, no text.
presets.negative: hard cuts, teleporting subject, inconsistent costume, broken body, unreadable action, shaky chaos, excessive blur, watermark

params.Seedance: 一镜到底要明确 camera path 和 no cuts.

presets.name: 产品广告短片
presets.scene: 产品 10-15 秒商业视频，适合数码、饮品、美妆、汽车。
presets.positive: Seedance premium product commercial, [时长] seconds, [比例]. Product: [产品]. Use reference image as strict product identity. Shot plan: macro detail reveal, hero rotation with controlled reflections, lifestyle usage moment, final packshot. Camera movement: slow push-in, parallax orbit, clean match cuts. Lighting: [光影风格]. Preserve product shape, label, color and logo in every shot. No extra text except exact final tagline: [标语].
presets.negative: wrong product, changed label, random text, extra logo, flicker, warped product, low quality, watermark, unstable camera

params.Seedance: 从汽车/手机/美妆广告分镜泛化。

presets.name: 护肤仪式感视频
presets.scene: 高端护肤/美妆品牌短片，强调微距、水润、柔和过渡。
presets.positive: Create a [比例] high-end skincare ritual video for Seedance, [时长] seconds. Brand mood: quiet luxury, glass-skin hydration, ivory and sage or [色彩]. Sequence: awakening morning light, cleanser texture macro, product application, water ripple transition, glowing skin close-up, final product hero. Use slow pull-back, delicate macro zoom, mist particles, soft lens flares, coherent editorial beauty aesthetic. Product [产品] remains the emotional focus.
presets.negative: changed product, over-smoothed skin, heavy makeup, random text, harsh light, flicker, inconsistent model, watermark

params.Seedance: 来自护肤 storyboard 参考，适合品牌感视频。

presets.name: 时尚蜕变脚本
presets.scene: 人物从日常到高级时装造型的连续转变。
presets.positive: Seedance fashion transformation story, 15 seconds. Character: [人物]. Scene 1: casual understated look in soft natural light, reflective mirror moment. Scene 2: wardrobe selection with fluid motion blur. Scene 3: accessories, jewelry, makeup and fabric macro details. Scene 4: full styling reveal with dramatic fashion lighting. Scene 5: confident runway walk, slow motion, spotlight. Scene 6: final magazine-cover freeze. Color evolves from soft muted tones to bold high-fashion contrast.
presets.negative: different person, outfit flicker, bad hands, random text, broken mirror, jumpy transition, watermark, low detail

params.Seedance: 参考库里的 transformation 结构，强在情绪递进。

presets.name: 第一人称追逐
presets.scene: FPV/POV 追逐、逃生、城市穿梭。
presets.positive: First-person POV Seedance video, [时长] seconds. The viewer is [身份/视角] moving through [场景]. Camera is chest-mounted or handheld, natural body motion, readable speed, environmental obstacles pass close to lens. Sequence: start calm, sudden trigger, rapid chase, narrow escape, final reveal. Use realistic motion blur, breathing rhythm, spatial audio implied by visuals, consistent geography, no UI text.
presets.negative: third-person view, impossible teleport, nausea shake, random subtitles, broken perspective, inconsistent location, watermark

params.Seedance: POV 类参考很多，关键是视角身份和空间连续。

presets.name: FPV穿越镜头
presets.scene: 无人机、鱼眼、穿越城市/建筑/自然场景。
presets.positive: Cinematic FPV racing drone shot for Seedance. Lens: 8mm fisheye, hyper-fluid motion, high speed but readable. Environment: [环境]. Flight path: dive from high altitude, skim close to surfaces, pass through a narrow opening, orbit [主体], then accelerate into a wide reveal. Realistic parallax, strong depth, dynamic light streaks, no cuts unless specified, no text overlays.
presets.negative: static camera, impossible path, clipping through objects, excessive blur, broken geometry, text, watermark, stutter

params.Seedance: 参考 FPV racing drone prompt 模式。

presets.name: 微距液体POV
presets.scene: 冰块入杯、汽水、咖啡、颜料等微距物理镜头。
presets.positive: Extreme macro Seedance video: [物体] enters [液体/容器] in slow motion. The camera follows at liquid surface level, bubbles, droplets, refraction and tiny splashes visible. Sequence: object approaches, first contact, liquid crown forms, bubbles rise, final calm hero macro. Photorealistic fluid physics, crisp highlights, shallow depth of field, high-speed cinematography, no text.
presets.negative: fake fluid, muddy bubbles, wrong scale, random objects, text, watermark, low detail, unstable focus

params.Seedance: 来自 ice cube soda 类 POV 参考，适合质感测试。

presets.name: 元素对决VFX
presets.scene: 武士、魔法、机甲、英雄类高能 VFX 短片。
presets.positive: 15-second Seedance elemental duel. Character A: [角色A] using [元素A]. Character B: [角色B] using [元素B]. Setting: [场景]. 0-5s tension setup and power charging, 5-10s high-speed approach with trails and environmental reaction, 10-15s central collision and controlled VFX explosion. Make effects physically interact with air, ground, fabric and particles. Cinematic fantasy realism, no gore, no captions.
presets.negative: unreadable chaos, inconsistent characters, excessive particles hiding action, gore, text, watermark, low quality, flicker

params.Seedance: 来自呼吸法/元素战斗提示词，保留三段式。

presets.name: 恐怖多幕短片
presets.scene: 悬疑、逃生、地下空间、怪物暗示。
presets.positive: Seedance survival horror short, [时长] seconds. Title concept: [概念]. Act 1: atmospheric opening in [地点], handheld realism, subtle dread. Act 2: discovery of [线索/入口], slow push-in, sound implied by visual tension. Act 3: descent into darker space, claustrophobic framing, emergency lights. Act 4: partial reveal of [威胁], never fully overexpose it. Act 5: final escape or twist. Cinematic realism, rain/fog/texture, no explicit gore, no text.
presets.negative: jump-scare text, gore, cartoon monster, inconsistent location, random subtitles, overbright horror, watermark, low detail

params.Seedance: 参考多幕恐怖短片结构；威胁要半遮半露。

presets.name: 汽车广告分镜
presets.scene: 高端汽车/摩托/交通工具短片。
presets.positive: Seedance cinematic automotive commercial, 15 seconds, 16:9, 4K look. Vehicle: [车型/车辆]. Concept: [广告概念]. Shot 1: low tracking shot of wheels and road texture. Shot 2: hero three-quarter reveal with reflections. Shot 3: dynamic driving through [环境]. Shot 4: interior detail macro. Shot 5: final stop, dust/rain/light reacting naturally. Preserve exact vehicle design and color, premium grading, no fake badges.
presets.negative: wrong car shape, fake logo, warped wheels, impossible driving, random text, license errors, flicker, watermark

params.Seedance: 参考汽车广告 storyboard 类型。

presets.name: 动漫高速硬切
presets.scene: 10秒内多硬切，适合动漫动作、MV、预告片。
presets.positive: Seedance anime high-speed cut test: [时长] seconds, around [镜头数] hard cuts. Subject: [角色/动作]. Each cut is a distinct readable composition: eye close-up, hand grip, foot impact, wide charge, profile slash, object reaction, silhouette, final hero frame. Strong anime timing, speed lines, impact frames, dynamic lighting, consistent character design and costume, no captions.
presets.negative: inconsistent character, unreadable cuts, random subtitles, broken anatomy, excessive smear, watermark, low quality

params.Seedance: 参考 anime hard cuts；镜头数要明确但别过密。

presets.name: 双人对白调度
presets.scene: 双人对话、冲突、暧昧、课堂/办公室/餐桌戏。
presets.positive: Seedance cinematic two-person dialogue scene, [时长] seconds. Characters: [角色A] and [角色B]. Setting: [场景]. Blocking: start with over-the-shoulder shot, cut to reaction close-up, slight overlap of gestures, one character interrupts or leans in, final silent beat. Natural facial micro-expressions, eye lines consistent, realistic mouth movement without readable subtitles, soft practical lighting, no text.
presets.negative: subtitles, wrong eyeline, face flicker, changed costume, extra people, uncanny mouth, watermark, low quality

params.Seedance: 对白视频要描述 blocking 和 reaction，而不是只写台词。

presets.name: 音乐舞台演出
presets.scene: 乐队、偶像、香水风舞台、MV片段。
presets.positive: Seedance music performance short. Performers: [表演者]. Stage concept: [舞台概念]. Camera sequence: wide stage reveal, dolly-in on lead performer, side tracking with dancers or instruments, overhead light sweep, final synchronized pose. Lighting reacts to rhythm, colorful but controlled costumes, cinematic concert atmosphere, no lyrics on screen, no random logos.
presets.negative: text lyrics, inconsistent faces, extra limbs, chaotic lighting, unreadable performance, watermark, flicker, low resolution

params.Seedance: 参考舞台/乐队/香水风演出案例。

presets.name: 参考图无缝变形
presets.scene: 多张参考图之间的形态/场景连续转场。
presets.positive: Seedance reference-driven seamless morph sequence using [参考图数量] images. Preserve the main subject identity while smoothly transforming from image 1 to image [参考图数量]. Each transition uses a visual bridge: matching silhouette, color wipe, object motion, lighting shift or camera move. No abrupt cuts, no new unrelated characters, maintain coherent perspective and material continuity, cinematic polish.
presets.negative: hard jump, identity loss, unrelated objects, melted face, broken geometry, text, watermark, flicker

params.Seedance: 参考 seven-image seamless morphing sequence。

presets.name: 工业延时建造
presets.scene: 产品组装、建筑搭建、机械运转、工厂流程。
presets.positive: Ultra-realistic industrial timelapse for Seedance. Subject/process: [流程]. Camera locked or slow slider move, machines and workers move efficiently, parts assemble in logical order, sparks, steam, dust and light rays behave naturally. Show beginning, mid-build complexity and final completed reveal. High-detail industrial textures, no impossible assembly, no safety chaos, no text overlays.
presets.negative: illogical assembly, teleporting parts, unsafe chaos, random text, broken machinery, flicker, watermark, low detail

params.Seedance: 参考 industrial timelapse 类型，适合制造流程。

presets.name: 海滩情绪片段
presets.scene: 宁静、治愈、青春、旅行、人物情绪短片。
presets.positive: Cinematic emotional beach sequence, 16 seconds. Character: [人物]. 0-4s golden-hour wide shot, gentle waves, subject walking slowly along shore. 4-8s medium shot at water edge, hand touching water. 8-12s close-up face toward horizon, soft rim light and shallow depth. 12-16s wide pull-back into silhouette, warm fade. Natural wind, delicate lens flare, calm reflective mood, consistent wardrobe.
presets.negative: changed character, random text, harsh sun, overdramatic acting, flicker, bad hands, watermark, low quality

params.Seedance: 来自海滩多镜头参考，适合情绪片。

presets.positive: Cinematic coming-of-age forest video, 15 seconds. A small group of [人物/群体] explores a lush forest during golden hour. Shots: wide arrival through trees, macro hands adjusting camera focus, slow-motion portrait session between trunks, 360-degree gentle orbit, final aerial pull-up through canopy as they review photos together. Dreamy haze, natural color grade, fine film grain, nostalgic warmth.
presets.negative: changed group, random text, fake forest, excessive fog, broken cameras, watermark, flicker, low detail

params.Seedance: 参考森林摄影创作段落，强调怀旧和镜头动作。

Start and end frame must match perfectly for infinite looping. Smooth micro-motion, natural light flicker avoided, no camera jump, no text, clean premium mood, high-resolution output.
presets.negative: non-looping end, camera jump, subject drift, flicker, random text, watermark, low quality, excessive motion

presets.negative: different identity, plastic skin, distorted eyes, bad hands, overfilter, random text, watermark, low detail

params.Nano Banana: 通用高质量 portrait 模板。

presets.name: 物体功能错位广告
presets.scene: 把家具/电子/服务放入不寻常容器，形成广告隐喻。
presets.positive: Conceptual advertising image using function misuse and scale mismatch. Primary subject: [主体]. It appears inside or replacing [不寻常容器], creating the idea [隐喻]. Clean studio tabletop, centered calm framing, hyper-real materials, believable contact shadows, editorial catalog cover feeling, exact optional text [文字].
presets.negative: unclear metaphor, bad scale, unreadable text, clutter, low detail, watermark, random objects

params.Nano Banana: 从 bottle/chair 概念广告抽象。

presets.name: 室内目录大片
presets.scene: 家具、灯具、家居品牌目录图。
presets.positive: High-end interior catalog photography for [家具/产品]. Place it in [室内场景] with complementary materials [材质]. Composition calm and editorial, natural window light plus soft fill, realistic shadows, product centered but integrated, magazine-quality styling, no people unless specified, no random text.
presets.negative: warped furniture, impossible room, clutter, wrong scale, fake reflections, watermark, low quality

params.Nano Banana: 适合家具和家居产品静态广告。

presets.name: 广告方向变体板
presets.scene: 同一 brief 的多种社媒广告方向，供挑选。
presets.positive: Create a campaign variant board for [产品/服务], 12 thumbnails in a clean 3x4 grid. Each thumbnail explores a different commercial route: premium hero, lifestyle use, macro detail, humorous scale mismatch, surreal metaphor, infographic, creator selfie, packaging flat lay, seasonal scene, urban night, natural daylight, final packshot. Keep brand identity consistent, no labels or numbers.
presets.negative: panel labels, inconsistent product, random text, cluttered thumbnails, low detail, watermark

params.Nano Banana: 适合一次性探索广告方向，后续挑选精修。

presets.name: 上身/上脸产品展示
presets.scene: 口红、指甲油、饰品、穿戴设备的真实展示。
presets.positive: Ultra-photoreal beauty product-on-body shot. Model: [模特]. Product: [产品]. Show the product being worn or applied on [部位], with matching color/finish visible, natural pose, clean beauty lighting, crisp product detail, realistic skin texture, accurate hand anatomy, premium editorial framing, background [背景]. Preserve identity if reference is provided.
presets.negative: bad hands, changed face, product hidden, wrong color, over-smoothed skin, random text, watermark, low detail

params.Nano Banana: 参考 nail polish / lip gloss 美妆场景。
